series_metadata.series_title: Unfair Labor Practices (ULPS) and Representation Cases
series_metadata.series_description: State Employee Relations Board Unfair Labor Practice charge filing, notice of appearance, exhibits, responses, investigation documents, disiplinary documents, arbitration decisions, grievance related documents and the SERB - Ruling/Decision. State Employee Relations Board Petitions for amendment of certification filings, exhibits, response documents, contract documents, reports, list, settlement agreement documents related documents and the SERB - Ruling/Decision.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area permanently. ; Electronic: Retain in electronic file permanently., Paper: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent
